headline: As Berkshire Buys Delta Airlines, This Billionaire Just Sold Off AAL and UAL Stocks
summary: Two billionaire investors are making opposite airline bets. While Berkshire is buying Delta, let’s take a closer look at why Appaloosa dumped American and United Airlines stocks.

headline: Why Delta Air Lines (DAL) is One of the Best Airline Stocks to Buy According to Reddit
summary: Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) is one of the best airline stocks to buy according to Reddit. Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) announced on May 13 the expansion of its trans-Atlantic schedule this fall, with the addition of special flights to Madrid and Munich for two major international professional football games taking place in November. headline: Lingering mysteries from Berkshire's portfolio update
summary: The addition of two new names, Delta Air Lines and Macy's, to the portfolio are hard to explain.

headline: Delta Route Suspension Puts Focus On Risk Management And Profit Mix
summary: Delta Air Lines extended the suspension of its Atlanta to Tel Aviv service until November 2026. The route remains offline due to ongoing security concerns in the Middle East. The decision affects a long haul corridor that previously linked Delta's main hub with Israel. For investors watching NYSE:DAL, this route decision comes as the stock trades around $76.14, with a 1 year return of 60.8% and a 3 year return of 119.2%. The stock is also up 8.4% over the past week and 11.3% over the past...
